h1.class: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-semibold mb-2 max-w-2xl mx-auto text-foreground

h2.class: text-3xl md:text-4xl font-semibold mb-6 max-w-2xl mx-auto text-foreground

p.class: text-base md:text-lg mb-8 max-w-2xl mx-auto leading-relaxed text-foreground

div.p: Hi, I'm Bob! I'm here to work right alongside you in your codebase, and help you build quality software faster.

div.class: flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 justify-center items-center
bg-accent animate-pulse h-12 rounded-full w-full sm:min-w-40 sm:w-fit px-3
bg-accent animate-pulse h-12 rounded-full w-full sm:min-w-40 sm:w-fit px-3

h2.class: text-center text-3xl md:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-foreground dark:text-blue-40

div.h2: What I can build with you

section.class: px-4 sm:px-8 md:px-16 lg:px-24 xl:px-32 bg-background relative

div.class: flex flex-col gap-3 sm:gap-4 lg:gap-5 w-full shrink-0 pl-6 sm:pl-8 lg:pl-12 pr-6 sm:pr-8 lg:pr-8 py-6 lg:w-[50%] lg:max-w-110

h3.class: text-xl sm:text-2xl lg:text-2xl font-semibold leading-tight text-foreground

p.class: text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-lg text-foreground

div.p: I can spawn focused agents and subagents that contribute to your code base. Each agent uses its own context, tools, and skills, to run work in parallel to handle long-running tasks in the background, and return only what matters. Faster answers. Clean context. Clearer results across even the largest projects.

div.class: w-full lg:flex-1 pt-5 sm:pt-6 lg:pt-8 pb-6 sm:pb-8 lg:pb-8 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-0 p-0! flex overflow-hidden [&_img]:rounded-none [&_img]:object-top [&_img]:h-full [&_img]:scale-140 [&_img]:origin-top-left

img.alt: Build with agents interface showing Bob spawning subagents in parallel
img.class: hidden dark:block w-full h-full object-cover object-top-left rounded-lg

div.class: flex flex-col gap-3 sm:gap-4 lg:gap-5 w-full shrink-0 pl-6 sm:pl-8 lg:pl-12 pr-6 sm:pr-8 lg:pr-8 py-4 lg:w-1/2

h3.class: text-xl sm:text-2xl lg:text-2xl font-semibold leading-tight text-foreground

div.h3: Develop in Your Favorite Human Language

p.class: text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-lg text-foreground

div.p: With Literate Coding, forget context-switching between chat windows and your editor. Explain what you want in natural language and I will generate the implementation in context.

div.class: w-full lg:w-1/2 pt-6 sm:pt-8 lg:pt-0 px-4 sm:px-6 md:px-0 lg:px-0

video.title: IDE showing literate coding with natural language instructions in source file

div.class: flex flex-col gap-3 sm:gap-4 lg:gap-5 w-full shrink-0 pl-6 sm:pl-8 lg:pl-12 pr-24 sm:pr-28 md:pr-32 lg:pr-8 py-6 lg:w-[50%] lg:max-w-110 self-stretch [background-image:var(--bg-image-light)] dark:[background-image:var(--bg-image-dark)] bg-size-[6rem_auto] sm:bg-size-[7rem_auto] md:bg-size-[8rem_auto] lg:bg-size-[11.75rem_auto] bg-position-[calc(100%-1rem)_1rem] sm:bg-position-[calc(100%-2rem)_1rem] md:bg-position-[calc(100%-2rem)_1rem] lg:bg-position-[center_calc(100%-2rem)] bg-no-repeat

h3.class: text-xl sm:text-2xl lg:text-2xl font-semibold leading-tight text-foreground

div.h3: Use AI in Your Entire Pipeline

p.class: text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-lg text-foreground z-10

div.p: I'm not confined to your IDE. With Bob Shell, I bring the same agents to your terminal, ready for interactive sessions, script automation, and continuous integration workflows across every stage of development.

div.class: w-full lg:flex-1 pt-5 sm:pt-6 lg:pt-8 pb-6 sm:pb-8 lg:pb-8 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-0

video.class: w-full h-auto rounded-lg lg:rounded-l-lg lg:rounded-r-none dark:border dark:border-[rgba(126,131,138,0.20)]

video.title: AI in pipeline interface showing Bob Shell
video.p: Your browser does not support the video tag.

div.class: flex flex-col gap-3 sm:gap-4 lg:gap-5 w-full shrink-0 pl-6 sm:pl-8 lg:pl-12 pr-6 sm:pr-8 lg:pr-8 py-4 lg:w-1/2

h3.class: text-xl sm:text-2xl lg:text-2xl font-semibold leading-tight text-foreground

p.class: text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-lg text-foreground

div.p: Track Bob's contributions to your software delivery lifecycle across the entire enterprise. Drive agentic adoption, prove real business value, and optimize the costs through comprehensive analytics and insights with Bobalytics.

div.class: w-full lg:w-1/2 pt-6 sm:pt-8 lg:pt-0 px-4 sm:px-6 md:px-0 lg:px-0 !p-4 rounded-3xl [background:var(--bob-feature-gradient)] overflow-hidden

div.class: w-full rounded-3xl overflow-visible md:overflow-hidden [background:var(--bob-feature-gradient)] pt-6 sm:pt-8 lg:pt-0 pb-6 sm:pb-8 lg:pb-0
flex flex-col gap-3 sm:gap-4 lg:gap-5 w-full shrink-0 pl-6 sm:pl-8 lg:pl-12 pr-6 sm:pr-8 lg:pr-8 py-6 lg:w-[50%] lg:max-w-110

h3.class: text-xl sm:text-2xl lg:text-2xl font-semibold leading-tight text-foreground

div.h3: Premium packages that move your stack forward

p.class: text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-lg text-foreground

div.p: I accelerate transformation across your applications. With premium packages, I bring purpose-built modes, skills, and workflows for enterprise modernization, from upgrading Java applications to the latest versions, to mainframe and IBM i development.

div.class: w-full lg:flex-1 pt-5 sm:pt-6 lg:pt-8 pb-6 sm:pb-8 lg:pb-8 px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-0 !pt-0 sm:!pt-4 lg:!pt-16 !pb-4 sm:!pb-8 lg:!pb-16

video.class: w-full h-auto rounded-lg lg:rounded-l-lg lg:rounded-r-none dark:border dark:border-[rgba(126,131,138,0.20)]
video.title: Java modernization workflow in Bob

div.class: flex flex-col gap-3 sm:gap-4 lg:gap-5 w-full shrink-0 pl-6 sm:pl-8 lg:pl-12 pr-6 sm:pr-8 lg:pr-8 py-4 lg:w-1/2

h3.class: text-xl sm:text-2xl lg:text-2xl font-semibold leading-tight text-foreground

div.h3: Access IBM's enterprise ecosystem with ease

p.class: text-base sm:text-lg lg:text-lg text-foreground

div.p: Connect to Red Hat, Instana, and more directly from your IDE. I eliminate context switching and bring enterprise-grade architecture, security, and monitoring right where you code.

div.class: w-full lg:w-1/2 pt-6 sm:pt-8 lg:pt-0 px-4 sm:px-6 md:px-0 lg:px-0 rounded-3xl [background:var(--bob-feature-gradient)]

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: Bob demonstrated a level of intelligence and contextual understanding that goes beyond anything I've seen in other tools. Bob goes beyond anything I've seen in other tools.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

div.span: Sr. Java Developer & Developer Advocate, Act Digital

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: M.R. Williams is advancing its IBM i modernization strategy with new mobile solutions and accounting system improvements, while leveraging IBM Bob to quickly interpret older RPG code, automate documentation, and streamline development workflows.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: The tool works very well and captures the modernization intent. Bob is the first tool of its kind to treat Java as a first-class citizen

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

div.span: Head of Java & Kotlin Engineering, VirtusLab

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: IBM Bob had a solid understanding of IoT development, including peripheral chips and devices, and was able to generate everything seamlessly from physical connections through to code. Bib is a highly reliable partner.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: IBM Bob isn't just another autocomplete tool. It is an AI-first development partner designed to transform the entire software lifecycle. Think of it as moving from 'help me code' to 'help me modernize, secure, and scale.'

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8 md:text-xl

blockquote.p: We leveraged BOB to modernise Java codebase from Java 11 to Java 25 and achieved an estimated ~90% faster delivery — 3 days vs. ~30+ days via a typical approach. The outcome was genuinely impressive and has opened multiple use cases for Blue Pearl to incorporate IBM BOB across our internal platforms as well as client engagements.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: Early results are very promising: in under 15 minutes, I had a small FPS-style prototype up and running while walking my son through what Bob can do. That combination of speed and explainability is exactly what I'm looking for in an AI coding companion.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

div.span: Director of Product Development, Supplier Shield

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: We use Bob for IBM i development, and one of its biggest strengths is its strong support for RPG and COBOL. Even with minimal instructions, it consistently gives spot-on answers, almost as if it can read between the lines.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: Project Bob isn't just another AI assistant. It's an agentic AI development partner built for large organizations tackling complex challenges — like modernizing legacy systems, ensuring compliance (HIPAA, FedRAMP), or scaling secure software delivery.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

div.span: Manager Technical Consultants and Support, Novadoc

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8 md:text-xl

blockquote.p: Project Bob sounds so wonderfully innocent but it is incredibly powerful. 3 prompts. That's all it took to build a production-ready MCP server. Project Bob blew my expectations out of the water. Bob delivers the kind of work you'd expect from an experienced developer who actually thinks about the full picture.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

div.span: Technical Presale Engineer, Appsys ICT Group

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8 md:text-xl

blockquote.p: Bob has built-in guardrails. It operates in different modes, allowing you to approve its suggestions before any changes are made to your source code. If you ask it about a non-existent RPG op-code, it won't "hallucinate" an answer; it will simply state that it doesn't understand. This controlled, predictable behavior is crucial for enterprise development.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: We built an application that processes video frames in parallel using OCR. By working closely with Bob, we were able to move smoothly from design to environment setup and deployment, resulting in significant improvements in both implementation accuracy and development speed.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8 md:text-xl

blockquote.p: When IBM Bob is given an RPG program, Bob is able to help us modernize it into our new java architecture quickly. IBM Bob reads and understands RPG code very well and was great for validating logic rewrites that have been done on multiple programs. It also adapted to our Java code architecture well, using predefined internal libraries and database connections.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: We load all the course materials into Project Bob and work together to identify where students are likely to get stuck. It supports them throughout the process, from understanding the context to polishing their writing, which reduces back and forth and saves a lot of time.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: Bob demonstrated a level of intelligence and contextual understanding that goes beyond anything I've seen in other tools. Bob goes beyond anything I've seen in other tools.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

div.span: Sr. Java Developer & Developer Advocate, Act Digital

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: M.R. Williams is advancing its IBM i modernization strategy with new mobile solutions and accounting system improvements, while leveraging IBM Bob to quickly interpret older RPG code, automate documentation, and streamline development workflows.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: The tool works very well and captures the modernization intent. Bob is the first tool of its kind to treat Java as a first-class citizen

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

div.span: Head of Java & Kotlin Engineering, VirtusLab

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: IBM Bob had a solid understanding of IoT development, including peripheral chips and devices, and was able to generate everything seamlessly from physical connections through to code. Bib is a highly reliable partner.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: IBM Bob isn't just another autocomplete tool. It is an AI-first development partner designed to transform the entire software lifecycle. Think of it as moving from 'help me code' to 'help me modernize, secure, and scale.'

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8 md:text-xl

blockquote.p: We leveraged BOB to modernise Java codebase from Java 11 to Java 25 and achieved an estimated ~90% faster delivery — 3 days vs. ~30+ days via a typical approach. The outcome was genuinely impressive and has opened multiple use cases for Blue Pearl to incorporate IBM BOB across our internal platforms as well as client engagements.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: Early results are very promising: in under 15 minutes, I had a small FPS-style prototype up and running while walking my son through what Bob can do. That combination of speed and explainability is exactly what I'm looking for in an AI coding companion.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

div.span: Director of Product Development, Supplier Shield

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: We use Bob for IBM i development, and one of its biggest strengths is its strong support for RPG and COBOL. Even with minimal instructions, it consistently gives spot-on answers, almost as if it can read between the lines.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: Project Bob isn't just another AI assistant. It's an agentic AI development partner built for large organizations tackling complex challenges — like modernizing legacy systems, ensuring compliance (HIPAA, FedRAMP), or scaling secure software delivery.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

div.span: Manager Technical Consultants and Support, Novadoc

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8 md:text-xl

blockquote.p: Project Bob sounds so wonderfully innocent but it is incredibly powerful. 3 prompts. That's all it took to build a production-ready MCP server. Project Bob blew my expectations out of the water. Bob delivers the kind of work you'd expect from an experienced developer who actually thinks about the full picture.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

div.span: Technical Presale Engineer, Appsys ICT Group

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8 md:text-xl

blockquote.p: Bob has built-in guardrails. It operates in different modes, allowing you to approve its suggestions before any changes are made to your source code. If you ask it about a non-existent RPG op-code, it won't "hallucinate" an answer; it will simply state that it doesn't understand. This controlled, predictable behavior is crucial for enterprise development.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: We built an application that processes video frames in parallel using OCR. By working closely with Bob, we were able to move smoothly from design to environment setup and deployment, resulting in significant improvements in both implementation accuracy and development speed.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8 md:text-xl

blockquote.p: When IBM Bob is given an RPG program, Bob is able to help us modernize it into our new java architecture quickly. IBM Bob reads and understands RPG code very well and was great for validating logic rewrites that have been done on multiple programs. It also adapted to our Java code architecture well, using predefined internal libraries and database connections.

div.class: relative z-20 flex flex-row items-center gap-3

span.class: relative flex size-8 shrink-0 overflow-hidden rounded-full w-10 h-10 md:w-14 md:h-14
bg-muted flex size-full items-center justify-center rounded-full

li.class: relative shrink-0 rounded-xl px-8 py-5 md:px-16 md:py-10 min-h-82 w-[calc(100dvw-4rem)] sm:w-120 2xl:w-164 flex justify-center bg-white dark:bg-secondary border border-blue-40

p.class: relative z-20 md:text-xl leading-8 text-secondary-foreground dark:text-white font-light mb-8

blockquote.p: We load all the course materials into Project Bob and work together to identify where students are likely to get stuck. It supports them throughout the process, from understanding the context to polishing their writing, which reduces back and forth and saves a lot of time.
